description: You are a Clinical Data Manager preparing the 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' (identifier: DM-TRIAL-2024) for enrollment. Using the credentials (username: root, password: Admin123!), update the study parameters for 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' to ensure GDPR compliance. Configure the following parameters: 'Collect Subject Date of Birth' as 'Only Year of Birth', 'Sex Required' as 'Not Used', 'Person ID Required' as 'Not Used', 'Interviewer Name Required for Data Entry' as 'Yes', and 'Interview Date Required for Data Entry' as 'Yes'. Finalize and save the configuration.
